name: sketch-real // cinematography asset engine
tagline: Sketch-to-photoreal previz plates for cinematography, powered by a tight production brief.
description:
sketch-real is a cinematography asset engine for turning rough sketches into photoreal production plates. Drop a sketch, fill the script-style brief, choose camera and output settings, then generate visual options for review.

This listing is in preview/test mode for now. You can open the live MVP and try the product architecture before the repo, installer, or production package is attached.
